stocks.impact_theory: FDA accelerated approval of KRESLADI for pediatric LAD-I, first gene therapy. Economic: Validates pipeline, potential $1B+ peak sales. Psychology: Biotech momentum ignites FOMO buying. Parallels: Similar to BioMarin's approval surges. Analogies: Like winning lottery ticket in volatile casino; rocket launch after years on pad.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Top trending news, premarket +11%, X sentiment positive on approval despite volatility. Web/X confirm catalyst strength, PDUFA alignment.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 20-40% gains on momentum squeeze, target $6.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Biotech volatility, accelerated approval risks, dilution from shelf.

stocks.justification: Direct FDA news, high engagement, historical biotech pops.

stocks.impact_theory: Ongoing U.S.-Iran war pushes oil >$100/bbl via Strait threats. Economic: Higher energy costs boost revenues. Psychology: Safe haven in commodities amid risk-off. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine oil surge. Analogies: Filling gas tank in traffic jam; rising tide lifts all oil boats.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Multiple articles link war to XOM gains, X posts bullish on dividends amid chaos. Oil majors hitting highs.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 5-10% upside to $175, dividend capture.

stocks.impact_theory: 4.2% drop amid risk-off from Iran war, inflation fears. Economic: Tech sensitive to rates/geopolitics. Psychology: Profit-taking after run-up. Parallels: 2022 bear market tech slide. Analogies: Balloon deflating in storm; herd exiting burning theater.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Articles note slide shaking markets, X risk-off sentiment, correction territory.

stocks.justification: Clear sentiment shift, but mega-cap resilience.

stocks.impact_theory: Airport delays/shutdown boost rental demand. Economic: Travel chaos = opportunity. Psychology: Short squeeze on positive surprise. Parallels: Post-COVID travel boom. Analogies: Cabs in subway strike; lifeguard in rip current.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Zoomed 13%, marketing + chaos cited, top gainer.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil surge from Iran war lifts services. Economic: Drilling ramps. Psychology: New highs attract. Parallels: Post-Ukraine activity. Analogies: Mechanic in car boom; wave surfer on swell.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: New 52w high, premarket up, oil tie-in.

stocks.justification: Sector tailwind strong, but secondary to majors.
